name: Cornmeal Pie Crust--1 Crust for 9-inch Pie
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup Firm bacon drippings OR Shortening (or lard)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and cornmeal in a bowl.
2. Cut in the bacon drippings or shortening until the mixture is granular.
3. Gradually add cold water, one tablespoon at a time, mixing until the dough forms a flaky crust.
4. Roll out the dough on a floured surface to form a circle that is 1 1/2 times larger than an inverted 9-inch pie pan.
5. Transfer the dough into the prepared pan and create a fluted edge around it.
6. Use for tamales (see recipe #79).
